allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $imgs = @\('Wizard\\Idle.png','Wizard\\Run.png','Wizard\\Attack1.png','Monsters\\slime waterB sheet.png','Monsters\\goblin sheet.png','Monsters\\skelleton sheet.png','Monsters\\Bat_0000_dark.png','Monsters\\troll_0000_green.png','Monsters\\Werewolf_0004_brown.png','Monsters\\wolf_0001_brown.png'\); foreach \($f in $imgs\) { $p = "c:\\Users\\nicol\\Documents\\math-game\\public\\assets\\sprites\\$f"; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($p\); "$f : $\($img.Width\)x$\($img.Height\)"; $img.Dispose\(\) })
